description_long: This object is a compact, heavily-armored tracked combat vehicle with a prominent, short-barreled cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features thick, angular armor plating covering the entire body, with pronounced geometric shapes and reinforced sections, especially at the front and turret. The tracks are wide and robust, with visible road wheels and a low ground clearance, suggesting a design optimized for urban maneuverability and protection. The turret is boxy and sits atop the main hull, with the cannon protruding forward and a possible hatch or sensor array on top. The vehicle's exterior is finished in a dark, solid color with no visible camouflage or markings. There are no visible windows or crew access points, emphasizing its armored and tactical nature.
description: A compact, heavily-armored tracked combat vehicle with a short-barreled cannon and robust, angular armor plating in a dark solid color.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick frontal armor, wide tracks, and the central placement of the short-barreled cannon.
description_view_1: Left-front angle highlights the turret's boxy shape, the cannon's length, and the detailed track system.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, the track width, and the absence of visible exhausts or hatches.
description_view_3: Right-front angle mirrors the left, showing the turret, cannon, and track details from the opposite side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced at the front and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid dark brown color.
